summary: Tested Baseball Live Stats page (/baseball/{id}/stats) and BaseballLiveGame Share/Live Stats buttons. All features working correctly.

team_names_and_scores_in_scoreboard.details: Away team (Riverside Sluggers) and Home team (TBD) names displayed with scores (0-0)

diamond_visualization.details: SVG diamond with base positions rendered correctly

ball_strike_out_count.details: B-S-O count indicators (10 circles) displayed below diamond

linescore_innings_1_9.details: Linescore table shows innings 1-9 with R, H, E columns (13 headers total)

current_inning_highlighted.details: Current inning (1) highlighted with amber background in linescore

live_indicator.details: LIVE indicator with green pulsing dot displayed for active games

share_button_on_live_stats.details: Share button present in header, copies URL to clipboard (clipboard API blocked in test env)

share_button_on_live_game.details: Share button on BaseballLiveGame copies live stats URL, shows 'Live stats link copied!' toast

live_stats_button_on_live_game.details: Live Stats button opens /baseball/{id}/stats in new tab correctly

GET /api/games/public/{id}.details: Returns baseball game data with sport='baseball', includes batting/pitching stats, inning_scores, bases, etc.
